name: RAWG
description: The largest open video game database. Search games, browse genres, find top ratings, and get detailed game info. Free tier available.

auth.hint: Register for a free API key at rawg.io/apidocs.

tools.name: search_games
tools.description: Search RAWG for games by title with their rating, release date, and platforms.

params.name: search
params.description: Search query, e.g. "The Last of Us"

params.name: genres
params.description: Filter by genre slugs, e.g. action,rpg

tools.name: get_game
tools.description: Get full details for a game: description, Metacritic score, release date, and developer.

tools.name: list_genres
tools.description: List all game genres with their game count and most popular games.
